arts.ttl: Liverpool and Luis Díaz ‘playing their cards’ in contract negotiations – Player expected to renew contract with Reds
arts.sum: On November 29th, we covered claims from Colombia which stated Liverpool haven’t yet made progress renewing Luis Díaz’s contract. It was also suggested Liverpool could sell him next summer if there’s no renewal and Barcelona and Paris Saint-Germain were named as potential contenders.
